name: Powder Screen
flavor: One second you're standing there. The next, there's just a lot of colored smoke and a faint, receding laugh.
description: You detonate a charge of colored smoke, filling a 15-foot cube within range with a thick, drifting haze that heavily obscures the area for the duration or until a strong wind (such as one created by a Strength check or a trick) disperses it. You can see through this smoke without penalty; every other creature treats it as any other heavily obscuring smoke.
sheetSummary: Action, 60 ft, 15-ft cube, cooldown 2, 1 min. Heavily obscures the area for everyone except you. Dispersible by strong wind.
